title: kanbus_clock: make main content row background pure black in dark mode
description: Comment, transition, and created info cards should render the main content body row background as pure black in dark mode instead of tinted band color.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing color update: set main content body row background to pure black for created/transition/comment card scenes.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented: main content body section background is now pure black in dark mode for issue_created/state_transition/comment_added cards. Added tests for dark/light behavior and updated palette expectations. Validation: py_compile + pytest tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (57 passed).
